ddls:
CREATE TABLE "boats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat type */,
  "boat_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat (e.g., M1x, M2-) */,
  "num_of_rowers" INTEGER /* Number of rowers in the boat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the boat */,
  "boat_length" TEXT /* Length of the boat in meters */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used to construct the boat */,
  "weight_capacity" TEXT /* Maximum weight capacity of the boat in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Summer Olympics) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event took place */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., sprint, marathon) */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance of the event in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events_locations" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nations" (
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nation */,
  "nation_name" TEXT /* Name of the nation */,
  "nation_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code of the nation */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the nation is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crews" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member in the boat */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the crew member */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the crew member in meters */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the crew member in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boats_nations" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the boat */,
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id", "nation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the boat used in the race */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event where the race took place */,
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nation that the boat represents */,
  "time" TEXT /* Race time in minutes and seconds */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "lane" INTEGER /* Lane number of the boat during the race */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Final position of the boat in the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_nation_id FOREIGN KEY ("nation_id") REFERENCES nations ("nation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew assignment */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race result */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crew member */,
  "seat_number" INTEGER /* Seat number of the crew member in the boat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_assignments_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_assignments_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crews ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, athlete, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
